body:
### Features & Improvements

- Support `exclude-newer` in `pyproject.toml` in the `[tool.pdm.resolution]` table ([#3776](https://github.com/pdm-project/pdm/issues/3776))

### Bug Fixes

- Preserve pylock package markers when refreshing lockfile hashes. ([#3773](https://github.com/pdm-project/pdm/issues/3773))

## What's Changed
* Remove dead code by @duriantaco in https://github.com/pdm-project/pdm/pull/3774
* [pre-commit.ci] pre-commit autoupdate by @pre-commit-ci[bot] in https://github.com/pdm-project/pdm/pull/3780
* chore(deps): bump the actions group with 5 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/pdm-project/pdm/pull/3778
* fix: update pdm_scheme to set pep582_base in sysconfig and add corresponding test by @frostming in https://github.com/pdm-project/pdm/pull/3781
* Allow `exclude-newer` to be defined in `pyproject.toml` by @sneakers-the-rat in https://github.com/pdm-project/pdm/pull/3782

## New Contributors
* @duriantaco made their first contribution in https://github.com/pdm-project/pdm/pull/3774
* @sneakers-the-rat made their first contribution in https://github.com/pdm-project/pdm/pull/3782

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pdm-project/pdm/compare/2.26.8...2.26.9
